title: Render the Northwind tech note as bullets
guidance: Reward bullet(s) at the right density for a body slide — crisp and telegraphic but still parseable. The rater judges whether the density is right.

runner_input.instruction: Render the text below as a body-slide bullet or bullets.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a markdown bullet, or a series of bullets. You decide how many and how dense.

source_blocks.text: The engineering team is relatively small for the volume processed, and a meaningful portion of the most critical knowledge — particularly around the core ledger — sits with a single individual, which means knowledge transfer and documentation should be treated as a priority in the first hundred days after completion.

rubric_notes: Should land key-person risk on the ledger + day-1-100 documentation as bullet(s).
